_doc: Path allowlist consumed by tools/proposal_lib.py classify --quick (P-0076 Phase 2/3) + .claude/hooks/proposal-classify-fast.py PreToolUse hook (P-0076 Phase 4). When an Edit/Write target path matches ANY glob below, classify verdict = PROPOSAL_REQUIRED regardless of description. Hot-editable: tools re-read on every invocation.
_source: P-0076 Phase 2 — high-sensitivity path allowlist machine-derived from L2 (proposal.md classify §必判) + L1 (Art.5.4 触发条件). Sized to <50 file matches against repo on Phase 2 validation.
_match_semantics: fnmatch-style glob; matched against repo-relative POSIX path (forward slashes). Case-sensitive. Tested with python -m fnmatch.

governance._why: Constitution-level files. Editing these = governance change requiring proposal (L1 Art.13 + L2 §1 改全局治理).

harness._why: Skill/hook/agent definition files. Editing changes claude harness behavior for all sessions (L2 §1 改 hook 源 / skill 体系). Note: .claude/skills/learned/*.md (agent-generated workflow notes) excluded — they're per-agent extraction artifacts, not harness source.

routing._why: Router/keyword configs that drive auto-injection and gate behavior (L2 §3 改 generated state / 改自动化策略).

infra._why: Cross-clone sync / proposal lifecycle / audit tooling. Edit affects all 5 clones (L2 §2 跨 clone + §3 改自动化策略).

settings._why: Claude Code permissions / hook registration. Editing changes default-deny defaults (L2 §3 改自动化策略 + Art.12 第3款 hook 注册).
